description.description: https://gitlab.com/eyeo/adblockplus/webstores/blob/d7acfa77af92c53bce1aa5e243bd81768e004e01/spec/chrome-web-store/listing-en_US.md#summary, Note: this cannot be longer than 132 characters
description.message: Remove ads on YouTube and everywhere else you browse.

name_releasebuild.description: Extension name to be shown for release builds. Note: this cannot be longer than 45 characters.

reverse_trial_ended_body_1.description: Body text for the reverse trial ended dialog part 1
reverse_trial_ended_body_1.message: Håper du nøt 14 dager med færre avbrudd.

reverse_trial_ended_body_2.description: Body text for the reverse trial ended dialog part 2
reverse_trial_ended_body_2.message: Vår standard blokkering fortsetter, selv om du kanskje merker en forskjell.

reverse_trial_ended_premium_button.description: CTA button text for the ended dialogs

reverse_trial_ended_title.description: Title for the reverse trial ended dialog
reverse_trial_ended_title.message: Forbedret blokkering av videoannonser er avsluttet

reverse_trial_learn_more.description: Text for the 'learn more' link that appear under the CTA button

reverse_trial_midpoint_body_1.description: Body text for the reverse trial midpoint dialog part 1
reverse_trial_midpoint_body_1.message: Du er halvveis gjennom en 14-dagers prøveperiode av vår avanserte blokkering av videoannonser.

reverse_trial_midpoint_body_2.description: Body text for the reverse trial midpoint dialog part 2
reverse_trial_midpoint_body_2.message: Oppgrader for å beholde det, eller det tilbakestilles automatisk til standard blokkering når det slutter.

reverse_trial_midpoint_decide_later.description: Link text for decide later close link

reverse_trial_midpoint_opt_out.description: Link text for opting out of the trial on the midpoint

reverse_trial_midpoint_premium_button.description: CTA button text for the midpoint dialogs

reverse_trial_midpoint_title.description: Title for the reverse trial midpoint dialog

reverse_trial_start_body.description: First paragraph of the start dialog body
reverse_trial_start_body.message: Vår mest avanserte blokkeringsteknologi betyr at du bør se færre avbrudd mens den er aktiv.

reverse_trial_start_title.description: Title for the reverse trial start dialog

reverse_trial_submit_feedback.description: Text for the 'submit feedback' link that appears under the CTA button
